steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject of the blank is its ruminations on fourteenth-century Persian life. The head noun ruminations is plural, so the subject phrase is plural.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice by rule
steps.content:
Rule: a verb must agree in number with its subject (subject-verb agreement).
  • Choice A — 'influence': plural present tense — agrees with the plural subject ruminations. ✓
  • Choice B — 'influences': singular present tense — violates subject-verb agreement with a plural subject. ✗
  • Choice C — 'is influencing': singular present progressive — violates subject-verb agreement with a plural subject. ✗
  • Choice D — 'has influenced': singular present perfect — violates subject-verb agreement with a plural subject. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
